citations.description: Only regression and undetermined tests present
plan_defect and env_integration tests are here (heldout file), not in the named file

findings.criterion: `tests/scripts/test_backfill_bug_class.py` passes (tier `scripts`): the four fixtures classify to `regression`, `plan_defect`, `env_integration`, `undetermined` respectively (exact-value asserts on the emitted record's `close_class`).
findings.detail: The named file `tests/scripts/test_backfill_bug_class.py` contains only two test functions: `test_revert_bug_backfills_regression` (regression) and `test_plain_closed_bug_backfills_undetermined` (undetermined). The `plan_defect` and `env_integration` fixtures are located in `tests/scripts/test_backfill_bug_class_heldout.py`, not in the file named by this criterion. The AC specifically requires all four classifications to be asserted in `tests/scripts/test_backfill_bug_class.py`.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
